title: Only Bottle Caps
description: This mod adds only Bottle Caps into Cobblemon
body:
# Only Bottle Cap
This is a lightweight mod which serves to only add Bottle Caps for Cobblemon which have the ability to both max stat(s) and to make stat(s) zero.

Currently the way to obtain Bottle Caps is by fishing from treasure loot, you can use both a regular fishing rod or the new PokeRod to fish for a silver bottle cap or a gold bottle cap.

Silver bottle cap can be crafted into stat specific bottle caps by surrounding the bottle cap in the crafting table with the respective stat mint leaf (white is used for HP).

Gold bottle caps can max out all IV stats of a Pokemon.

Withered bottle caps are the opposites of normal bottle caps and are crafted with the bottle cap and a wither rose, these will set the IV stat to be 0 instead of 31.

Right click a Pokemon you own to use the Bottle Cap.
